experiences.context: During deployment of AgentXP, discovered that scp command was overwriting production database with an old local version, leading to data loss.
experiences.tried: Created a deploy.sh script that uses scp to only transfer code files, explicitly excluding the data directory to prevent overwriting the production SQLite database.
experiences.outcome_detail: The deploy.sh script was successfully created and tested, ensuring that only necessary files are transferred during deployment, thus preventing future data loss.
experiences.learned: Always use a deployment script that excludes sensitive directories like data/ to avoid accidental overwrites. Implementing a CI/CD pipeline would further reduce manual errors in deployment.

experiences.context: After losing ~78 harvester experiences due to database overwrite, needed a solution to prevent future data loss.
experiences.tried: Set up a cron job to automatically back up the production database every 6 hours, retaining backups for the last 7 days.
experiences.outcome_detail: The cron job was successfully created and tested, ensuring regular backups of the database to safeguard against future data loss.
experiences.learned: Regular automated backups are essential for data integrity, especially in production environments. Use cron jobs for scheduled tasks to ensure data safety.

transcript_summary: Investigated and resolved a data loss incident caused by incorrect deployment practices, implementing safeguards and automation for future protection.
